problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: If Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
